chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 584 of 2007 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.3415/2022 (C/A) 31.08.2022 Mr. Muhammad Sadiq Ansari, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Noor Hassan Malik, Assistant Advocate General >>>>>>>>..<<<<<<< By means of listed application, the petitioner seeks initiation of contempt proceedings against the alleged contemnors for violating the order dated 06.05.2009 whereby by consent this petition was disposed of by directing the respondent to pay Rs.1,61,081/- to petitioner as admitted in their comments on or before 20.05.2009. Admittedly, that amount has been paid, however, the contention of learned counsel for the petitioner is that they have not paid further amount regarding that it was contended by the counsel for the petitioner on 06.05.2009 that petitioner to trace out the record and will submit fresh bill to the respondents. However, no order was passed by this Court regarding further payment, hence this application having no merits at all is dismissed; however, with costs of Rs.5000/- (Rupees five thousand), which shall be deposited by the petitioner within fifteen days hereof in the High Court Bar Clinic fund. Judge Judge ARBROHI
